creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA512

Instead of deprecating the SUPHP option, how about removing it?

- From grepping through Makefiles which include bsd.horde.mk nothing
seems to depend on the SUPHP option.  After applying the attached
patch, 'make index' runs fine on 10.0-amd64

René
